title: EVA charactor spokespersons
wikitext:
[]: EVA charactor spokespersons             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Feb 09, 2006 8:05 pm This one came to me a day ago and i thought everyone would enjoy it.Its kinda like my "EVA talent show " topic so here go's. If the EVA charactors were spokespeople what products would they advertise? Kaji would advert condoms.how cool would it be to buy a 20 pack with a pic of Kaji on the box giving you the tumbs up?Wrap it before you tap it!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Feb 09, 2006 8:37 pm Misato, an adoption agency. Ritsuko, hair dye.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Feb 09, 2006 8:51 pm Keel would advertise for Microsoft Vlad (committeeman from Russia) would advertise for Vodka. Asuka would advertise for Midol and other cramp-releif products. Kaji would advertise for razors and shaving cream

[]:             Quote Post by jonneh » Thu Feb 09, 2006 9:11 pm And, I think we all know, Shinji would advertise for some Psychologist's Office. ; D Shinji : They helped me understand myself! *smile*

[]:             Quote Post by C.W.Robson46290 » Thu Feb 09, 2006 9:15 pm Well, you could have Kensuke advertise cameras, or even better, a Kensuke "Go Navy!" commercial with blaring Godsmack in the background "Accelerate your life". Toji could advertise any sort of food products, McDonald's, Pepsi, you name it. Hikari could sell like little kids back to school stuff, like the power rangers backbacks in our world, only their world's version. Shigeru could sell guitar stuff, and I bet Hyuga could sell some comics. Maybe Maya could be an Apple sopkesperson. Just some thoughts.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Feb 09, 2006 9:19 pm Gendo could advertise for RayBan Keel could advertise for oil and other mechanical lubricants Fuyutsuki could be the next Bill Nye the Science Guy, only for Japan! Hikari could get her own cooking show And Ritsuko could design attractive lab wear (believe me its needed)

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Fri Feb 10, 2006 11:01 am Misato - Budwizer Rei - Clones r us Gendo - Pimp my ride Asuka - German propaganda minister( Nazi propaganda minister )

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Fri Feb 10, 2006 11:08 am Rei Ayanami: KFC ... I hate 'in' jokes...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Feb 10, 2006 11:35 am I would like to point out that this topic is ironic in that there was already blatant product placement.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Feb 10, 2006 11:59 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I would like to point out that this topic is ironic in that there was already blatant product placement.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Feb 10, 2006 12:09 pm I would buy the whole set just so I could shoot the Karowu one with my BB gun. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Feb 10, 2006 1:09 pm Pen Pen could be a disny spokes bird

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Fri Feb 10, 2006 1:15 pm NO NO no! I'd buy em, just to burn Kawuro and shoot Shinji with my dad's pistol.. Thank god my red head ain't a cheap girl, but I'd love her all the same if she was....

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Fri Feb 10, 2006 1:30 pm I... don't... believe... that...such... things... can happen! :shock: :shock: :shock: But two crucial characters are missing, or at least I miss them: Kaji and Pen-Pen. Hmmm... What if there would be Vodka advertised by EVAs, with a slogen like "It kicks as hard as an EVA does!", or something better than this. ... GNR as Bible cover... :shock: Kaji could advertise a book with a title like "How to conquer women?", and some shaving stuff. Gendo could do so with gloves and suits. Asuka could be a modell, and maybe Ayanami too. Keel could advertise CIA, or books concerning fear-based leadership and similar stuff. Ummm... thats all I can think of at the moment.

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Fri Feb 10, 2006 2:28 pm theres no Kaji, and I dont think theres a PenPen. Theres a group photo, though, of all of them on the cans.

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Fri Feb 10, 2006 2:42 pm Shinji-anti depresants(spell right?) Asuka would make a self help video entitled "how to be a uber bitch in less than a week"(not hating Asuka here) hikari-her own cook books toji- his own line of sports shoes.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Feb 10, 2006 3:54 pm I seem to remember a funny fan fic back when I went to EVA fics all the time. Asuka was the spokes person for a brand of coffie called UberBitch.
